meta.homeTitle: Sanas Technology — Software, Cloud & AI Solutions
meta.homeDescription: Since 2004 we build software systems used by millions. Fintech, logistics, healthcare, AI, mechatronics and cloud solutions.
meta.projectsDescription: Platforms in daily use at scale.

home.aiBody: Because until code is tested in production, it is nothing more than fiction.
home.slogan: With the magic of code, to endless solutions.
home.quote: “ You don’t need light to find your way in the dark. If you drew the map yourself, staying in the shadows is your greatest advantage. ”
home.dom1d: Payments, accounting and trading systems — math under load.
home.dom2d: Routes, fleets, warehouses — real-time tracking and planning.
home.dom3d: Sensitive data, uninterrupted access, zero tolerance.
home.dom4d: Models run inside products, not in showcases.
home.dom5d: Embedded systems, robotics and electronics — code that talks to hardware.
home.dom6d: Infrastructure that scales — deployment, monitoring and high availability in the cloud.
home.quote2: The Lean Architecture of Complex Systems
home.sloganHero: With the Magic of Code, to Endless Solutions
